name: web/.env.development
code:
# 开发环境：后端跑在本机 3002
VITE_API_BASE=http://localhost:3002

name: web/.env.production
code:
# 生产环境：
#   - 如果前后端同域部署（推荐，最省心），留空即可：
#     vite build 出来的静态文件由 Express 直接 serve，
#     前端请求 /api/xxx 自动打到同一个 origin
VITE_API_BASE=

# 或者填外部域名（前后端分开部署时）：
# VITE_API_BASE=https://chatbox-api.example.com

name: web/src/api/request.js
web/src/api/auth.js
code:
import request from './request'

export const authApi = {
  register: ({ username, password }) =>
    request.post('/api/auth/register', { username, password }),

  login: ({ username, password }) =>
    request.post('/api/auth/login', { username, password }),

  me: () => request.get('/api/auth/me')
}

name: web/src/api/conversations.js
code:
import request from './request'

export const conversationsApi = {
  list:   ()         => request.get('/api/conversations'),
  create: (title)    => request.post('/api/conversations', { title }),
  rename: (id, title)=> request.patch(`/api/conversations/${id}`, { title }),
  remove: (id)       => request.delete(`/api/conversations/${id}`)
}
